name: Gatlinburg Mountain Escape
description: Explore the smoky mountains, local distilleries, and cozy cabin retreats in the heart of Gatlinburg, Tennessee.

name: Gatlinburg Luxury Retreat
description: Unwind in a luxury mountain lodge with spa services, fine dining, and stunning views of the Great Smoky Mountains.

name: Birmingham City Break
description: Discover Birmingham's thriving food scene, civil rights history, and vibrant arts district on this urban weekend getaway.

name: Birmingham Food & Culture Tour
description: Spend a week immersed in Birmingham's award-winning restaurant scene, local breweries, and historic landmarks.

name: Chattanooga Adventure Weekend
description: Rock climbing at Lookout Mountain, kayaking the Tennessee River, and exploring the famous Tennessee Aquarium.

name: Chattanooga Luxury River Stay
description: An extended luxury stay along the Tennessee River with guided excursions, fine dining, and premium spa access.

name: Huntsville Space & Science Weekend
description: Visit the US Space & Rocket Center, Monte Sano State Park, and Huntsville's growing craft beer and food scene.

name: Nashville Music City Week
description: Live music on Broadway, hot chicken, and honky-tonks — a full week soaking in everything Music City has to offer.

name: Atlanta Extended City Experience
description: Explore the Georgia Aquarium, World of Coca-Cola, Piedmont Park, and Atlanta's world-class dining over an extended luxury stay.

name: Mobile Gulf Coast Getaway
description: Sun, seafood, and history along Alabama's Gulf Coast — visit USS Alabama, white sand beaches, and Mardi Gras museums.
